summary.key_theme: ServiceNow 透過擴大 AI 治理與企業級 AI 代理合作夥伴生態系，展現強大的定價能力與長期成長潛力，儘管短期股價受市場波動影響。

bullish.title: Raymond James sees ServiceNow pricing power driving high-margin growth
bullish.reason: Raymond James 分析師 Adam Tindle 指出 ServiceNow 具備強大的定價能力，預期將推動高利潤成長，這是支撐股價長期看漲的核心基本面因素。

bullish.title: ServiceNow (NOW) Expands AI Governance And Public Sector Reach With New Partnerships
bullish.reason: 透過與多方建立 AI 治理與公共部門合作，強化了 ServiceNow 作為企業 AI 控制塔的市場地位，有助於擴大營收來源。

bullish.title: Aria Systems, ServiceNow (NOW) Launch World’s First Agentic BSS for Communication Service Providers
bullish.reason: 與 Aria Systems 合作推出全球首個電信業代理式 BSS，展示了公司在 AI 代理技術應用上的領先地位。

bullish.title: Cognizant (CTSH) Integrates ServiceNow (NOW) AI Agents With Neuro AI Multi-Agent Accelerator
bullish.reason: 與 Cognizant 的技術整合進一步擴大了 ServiceNow AI 代理的生態系應用場景。

bullish.title: Nametag Deepens Partnership with ServiceNow to Protect Enterprise Helpdesks Against Impersonation Attacks
bullish.reason: 深化與 Nametag 的合作，強化企業服務台的資安防護能力，提升平台產品價值。

bullish.title: ID.me, Servos, and ServiceNow Partner to Modernize State Benefits Administration
bullish.reason: 成功打入政府部門的福利行政系統現代化專案，顯示其解決方案在公共領域的擴展性。

bullish.title: Is ServiceNow (NOW) One of the Best AI Software Stocks to Buy According to Hedge Funds?
bullish.reason: 獲得避險基金青睞，顯示機構投資人對其 AI 軟體領域的長期成長信心。

bullish.title: Here’s Why ServiceNow Inc (NOW) is a Buy and High Growth Large Cap Stock to Invest In
bullish.reason: Benchmark 等機構重申買入評級，肯定其作為高成長大型股的投資價值。

bearish.title: ServiceNow (NOW) Dips More Than Broader Market: What You Should Know
bearish.reason: 股價單日下跌 2.23%，表現弱於大盤，反映短期獲利了結賣壓。

bearish.title: ServiceNow (NOW) Suffers a Larger Drop Than the General Market: Key Insights
bearish.reason: 股價下跌 2.14%，顯示在市場波動期間，高估值軟體股面臨較大的修正壓力。

bearish.title: AI Concerns Hurt ServiceNow (NOW) Despite Strong Earnings
bearish.reason: 儘管財報強勁，但市場對 AI 相關的潛在擔憂仍對股價造成壓抑。

neutral.title: ServiceNow, Inc. (NOW) Is a Trending Stock: Facts to Know Before Betting on It
neutral.reason: 僅為市場熱度分析，未提供具體利多或利空消息。

neutral.title: What's Going On With The Boost In ServiceNow Stock?
neutral.reason: 歸因於軟體類股的整體反彈，而非公司特定基本面變化。

neutral.title: Price Prediction: ServiceNow Stock Will Be Worth This Much In 2027
neutral.reason: 長期價格預測，對短期股價影響有限。
